section_name: Aeronautical Education Programs and Flight Clinics
text:
(a) The department may:

(1) organize and administer an aeronautical education program in colleges and schools of this state and for the public; and

(2) prepare and conduct one or more flight clinics for air crews.

(b) The department may charge for conducting a program or clinic under Subsection (a).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.065 — Aeronautical Education Programs and Flight Clinics

(a) The department may:

    (1) organize and administer an aeronautical education program in colleges and schools of this state and for the public; and

    (2) prepare and conduct one or more flight clinics for air crews.

(b) The department may charge for conducting a program or clinic under Subsection (a).

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: organize and administer an aeronautical education program in colleges and schools of this state and for the public; and
prepare and conduct one or more flight clinics for air crews.

subsections.label: b
